spec.scope: LoRA adapter weights only (frozen base unaffected)
spec.swap_policy: use ema_w only at eval/inference; train continues on w
spec.ckpt_emit: both w and ema_w persisted in checkpoint json

expected_signal: convergence smoothing; val loss decrease at zero risk
rollback: unset ANIMA_EMA_DECAY env var; runner reverts to plain weight tracking
